sections.biography-sanguo-yanyi: Liu Yao, styled Zhengli (and sometimes incorrectly referenced as Liu Yong), served as Imperial Inspector of Yangzhou. He was Liu Dai’s younger brother. Employed the services of Taishi Ci. In the novel, he sent Taishi Ci to the aid of Liu Bei and Tao Qian while they were battling Cao Cao. He would later be defeated by Sun Ce (who would also employ Taishi Ci), and soon after died of illness.

full_text:
Liu Yao (Zhengli) 劉繇 (正禮)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yao (劉繇), styledZhengli (正禮), was born in Mouping County, Donglai Commandery. Imperial Inspector of Yangzhou. Liu Dai’s brother. Defeated by Sun Ce, then died of illness. Liu Yao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu Yao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

Liu Yao’s SGZ
BiographySanguo Yanyi
Liu Yao, styled Zhengli (and sometimes incorrectly referenced as Liu Yong), served as Imperial Inspector of Yangzhou. He was Liu Dai’s younger brother. Employed the services of Taishi Ci. In the novel, he sent Taishi Ci to the aid of Liu Bei and Tao Qian while they were battling Cao Cao. He would later be defeated by Sun Ce (who would also employ Taishi Ci), and soon after died of illness.
